    99→class _PresenceListModel(QAbstractListModel):
   100→    """
   101→    A trivial QAbstractListModel that exposes colleagues to the QListView.
   102→
   103→    This model is intentionally 100 % dumb: all mutations come from the
   104→    PresenceViewModel which will feed new lists in one go.
   105→    """
   106→
   107→    # Roles used by the delegate for painting
   108→    UID_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 1
   109→    DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 2
   110→    AVATAR_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 3
   111→    PRESENCE_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 4
   112→
   113→    _ROLE_NAMES = {
   114→        UID_ROLE: QByteArray(b"uid"),
   115→        DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE: QByteArray(b"display_name"),
   116→        AVATAR_ROLE: QByteArray(b"avatar"),
   117→        PRESENCE_ROLE: QByteArray(b"presence"),
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    def __init__(self, colleagues: Optional[List[Colleague]] = None, parent: QObject | None = None) -> None:
   121→        super().__init__(parent)
   122→        self._colleagues: List[Colleague] = colleagues or []
   123→
   124→    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   125→    # Required overrides                                                    #
   126→    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   127→
   128→    def rowCount(self, parent: QModelIndex = QModelIndex()) -> int:  # noqa: N802
   129→        return 0 if parent.isValid() else len(self._colleagues)
   130→
   131→    def data(self, index: QModelIndex, role: int = Qt.DisplayRole):  # noqa: N802
   132→        if not index.isValid():
   133→            return None
   134→
   135→        try:
   136→            colleague = self._colleagues[index.row()]
   137→        except IndexError:
   138→            return None
   139→
   140→        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:
   141→            return colleague.display_name
   142→        if role == self.UID_ROLE:
   143→            return colleague.uid
   144→        if role == self.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE:
   145→            return colleague.display_name
   146→        if role == self.AVATAR_ROLE:
   147→            return colleague.avatar_path
   148→        if role == self.PRESENCE_ROLE:
   149→            return colleague.presence
   150→        return None
   151→
   152→    def roleNames(self) -> dict[int, QByteArray]:  # noqa: N802
   153→        return self._ROLE_NAMES
   154→
   155→    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   156→    # Public API                                                            #
   157→    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   158→
   159→    def update_content(self, colleagues: List[Colleague]) -> None:
   160→        """Replace the entire model dataset in one shot."""
   161→        self.beginResetModel()
   162→        self._colleagues = colleagues
   163→        self.endResetModel()

   166→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   167→# Custom Delegate                                                             #
   168→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   169→
   170→class PresenceItemDelegate(QStyledItemDelegate):
   171→    """Paints each list item with avatar, name and presence indicator icon."""
   172→
   173→    AVATAR_SIZE = 32
   174→    PADDING = 6
   175→
   176→    # Map string status values to icons
   177→    _PRESENCE_ICONS = {
   178→        "online": QIcon(":/presence/online.svg"),
   179→        "away": QIcon(":/presence/away.svg"),
   180→        "dnd": QIcon(":/presence/dnd.svg"),
   181→        "offline": QIcon(":/presence/offline.svg"),
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    # Also support enum-like objects
   185→    @classmethod
   186→    def _get_presence_icon(cls, presence) -> QIcon:
   187→        """Get icon for a presence state (string or enum)."""
   188→        if isinstance(presence, str):
   189→            return cls._PRESENCE_ICONS.get(presence.lower(), QIcon())
   190→        elif hasattr(presence, 'value'):
   191→            return cls._PRESENCE_ICONS.get(str(presence.value).lower(), QIcon())
   192→        else:
   193→            return cls._PRESENCE_ICONS.get(str(presence).lower(), QIcon())
   194→
   195→    def paint(self, painter: QPainter, option: QStyleOptionViewItem, index: QModelIndex) -> None:
   196→        painter.save()
   197→        try:
   198→            # Draw selection highlight
   199→            if option.state & QStyle.State_Selected:
   200→                painter.fillRect(option.rect, option.palette.highlight())
   201→
   202→            # Fetch data
   203→            name: str = index.data(_PresenceListModel.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE)
   204→            avatar_path: str = index.data(_PresenceListModel.AVATAR_ROLE)
   205→            presence = index.data(_PresenceListModel.PRESENCE_ROLE)
   206→
   207→            # Avatar
   208→            avatar_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.PADDING, self.PADDING,
   209→                                               -(option.rect.width() - self.AVATAR_SIZE - self.PADDING),
   210→                                               -self.PADDING)
   211→            if avatar_path:
   212→                avatar_pix = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(self.AVATAR_SIZE, self.AVATAR_SIZE,
   213→                                                         Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)
   214→                painter.drawPixmap(avatar_rect.topLeft(), avatar_pix)
   215→
   216→            # Presence indicator bottom-right of avatar
   217→            presence_icon = self._get_presence_icon(presence)
   218→            indicator_sz = 10
   219→            indicator_rect = avatar_rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,
   220→                                                  self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,
   221→                                                  0, 0)
   222→            presence_pix = presence_icon.pixmap(indicator_sz, indicator_sz)
   223→            painter.drawPixmap(indicator_rect.topLeft(), presence_pix)
   224→
   225→            # User name
   226→            text_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING,
   227→                                             0, -self.PADDING, 0)
   228→            painter.setPen(option.palette.text().color())
   229→            text_option = QTextOption()
   230→            text_option.setAlignment(Qt.AlignVCenter | Qt.AlignLeft)
   231→            painter.drawText(text_rect, name or "", text_option)
   232→
   233→        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
   234→            logger.exception("Failed to paint presence delegate.")
   235→        finally:
   236→            painter.restore()
   237→
   238→    def sizeHint(self, option: QStyleOptionViewItem, index: QModelIndex):  # noqa: N802
   239→        base = super().sizeHint(option, index)
   240→        return base.expandedTo(QSize(0, self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING))
   241→

   243→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   244→# PresenceWidget                                                              #

   246→
   247→class PresenceWidget(QWidget):
   248→    """
   249→    QWidget exposing team presence.
   250→
   251→    Responsibilities
   252→    ----------------
   253→    1. Build UI (list-view, refresh button)
   254→    2. Bind ViewModel (subscribe to signals / event-bus)
   255→    3. Bridge drag-and-drop to external micro-front-ends
   256→    4. Optionally integrate with UserService for unified user data
   257→    """
   258→
   259→    # Emitted when the user drags a colleague over somewhere else
   260→    colleagueDragStarted = Signal(str)  # uid
   261→
   262→    def __init__(
   263→        self,
   264→        view_model: "PresenceViewModel",
   265→        user_service: Optional["UserService"] = None,
   266→        parent: QWidget | None = None
   267→    ) -> None:
   268→        super().__init__(parent)
   269→        self._vm = view_model
   270→        self._user_service = user_service
   271→
   272→        self._build_ui()
   273→        self._bind_view_model()
   274→        self._connect_theme_changes()
   275→
   276→        # Enable drag source
   277→        self._list_view.setDragEnabled(True)
   278→        self._list_view.viewport().setAcceptDrops(False)
   279→        self._list_view.setDefaultDropAction(Qt.IgnoreAction)
   280→
   281→        logger.debug("PresenceWidget initialised.")
   282→
   283→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   284→    # UI                                                                  #
   285→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   286→
   287→    def _build_ui(self) -> None:
   288→        self._list_view = QListView(self, objectName="presenceListView")
   289→        self._list_view.setSpacing(4)
   290→        self._list_view.setUniformItemSizes(True)
   291→        self._list_view.setSelectionMode(QListView.NoSelection)
   292→        self._list_view.setItemDelegate(PresenceItemDelegate(self._list_view))
   293→
   294→        self._refresh_btn = QPushButton(self.tr("Refresh"))
   295→        self._refresh_btn.setToolTip(self.tr("Force a manual presence refresh"))
   296→
   297→        # Top bar
   298→        top_layout = QHBoxLayout()
   299→        top_layout.addWidget(QLabel(self.tr("Presence")))
   300→        top_layout.addItem(QSpacerItem(0, 0, QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Minimum))
   301→        top_layout.addWidget(self._refresh_btn)
   302→
   303→        # Main layout
   304→        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)
   305→        layout.addLayout(top_layout)
   306→        layout.addWidget(self._list_view)
   307→        self.setLayout(layout)
   308→
   309→        # Model
   310→        self._model = _PresenceListModel([])
   311→        self._list_view.setModel(self._model)
   312→
   313→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   314→    # Data Binding                                                       #
   315→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   316→
   317→    def _bind_view_model(self) -> None:
   318→        self._refresh_btn.clicked.connect(self._vm.refresh)
   319→        self._vm.presence_changed.connect(self._on_presence_changed)
   320→
   321→        # For initial data - try UserService first, fall back to snapshot
   322→        if self._user_service:
   323→            self._refresh_from_user_service()
   324→        else:
   325→            self._on_presence_changed(self._vm.snapshot())
   326→
   327→    def _refresh_from_user_service(self) -> None:
   328→        """Refresh colleague list from UserService."""
   329→        if not self._user_service:
   330→            return
   331→
   332→        colleagues = []
   333→        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():
   334→            colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))
   335→        self._model.update_content(colleagues)
   336→
   337→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   338→    # Theme                                                              #
   339→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   340→
   341→    def _connect_theme_changes(self) -> None:
   342→        if hasattr(ThemeManager, "theme_changed"):
   343→            ThemeManager.theme_changed.connect(self._on_theme_changed)
   344→
   345→    @Slot(dict)
   346→    def _on_theme_changed(self, theme_meta: dict) -> None:
   347→        """
   348→        Triggered when the global theme changed.
   349→
   350→        For the sake of demo we only update the list spacing/palette; more
   351→        thorough implementation would adapt colors in the delegate, etc.
   352→        """
   353→        palette = self.palette()
   354→        palette.setColor(self.backgroundRole(), QColor(theme_meta.get("window", "#FFFFFF")))
   355→        self.setPalette(palette)
   356→
   357→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   358→    # ViewModel slot                                                     #
   359→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   360→
   361→    @Slot(list)
   362→    def _on_presence_changed(self, colleagues: List[Colleague]) -> None:
   363→        logger.debug("PresenceWidget received %d colleagues.", len(colleagues))
   364→        self._model.update_content(colleagues)
   365→
   366→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   367→    # Drag-and-drop                                                      #
   368→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   369→
   370→    def startDrag(self, supportedActions: Qt.DropActions) -> None:  # noqa: N802
   371→        """Override QListView drag start behaviour."""
   372→        index = self._list_view.currentIndex()
   373→        if not index.isValid():
   374→            return
   375→
   376→        uid = index.data(_PresenceListModel.UID_ROLE)
   377→        display_name = index.data(_PresenceListModel.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE)
   378→        avatar_path = index.data(_PresenceListModel.AVATAR_ROLE)
   379→
   380→        logger.debug("Start drag for user %s", display_name)
   381→        drag = QDrag(self)
   382→        mime_data = self._vm.build_mime_data(uid)
   383→        drag.setMimeData(mime_data)
   384→
   385→        # Pixmap for drag feedback
   386→        if avatar_path:
   387→            pixmap = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(48, 48, Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)
   388→            drag.setPixmap(pixmap)
   389→            drag.setHotSpot(QPoint(pixmap.width() // 2, pixmap.height() // 2))
   390→
   391→        drag.exec_(Qt.MoveAction)
   392→        self.colleagueDragStarted.emit(uid)
   393→
   394→

   397→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #

   416→    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
   417→
   418→    def refresh(self) -> None:
   419→        """Refresh presence data."""
   420→        if self._user_service:
   421→            # Trigger a refresh from UserService
   422→            colleagues = []
   423→            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():

   429→        if self._user_service:
   430→            colleagues = []
   431→            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():
   432→                colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))
   433→            return colleagues
   434→        return []

   441→# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #
   442→
   443→if __name__ == "__main__":  # pragma: no cover
   444→    # Minimal harness to showcase the widget in isolation.
   445→    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)
   446→
   447→    class _DummyVM(PresenceViewModel):
   448→
   449→        def __init__(self) -> None:
   450→            super().__init__()
   451→            self._colleagues = [
   452→                Colleague("1", "Alice", ":/avatars/alice.png", "online"),
   453→                Colleague("2", "Bob", ":/avatars/bob.png", "away"),
   454→                Colleague("3", "Charlie", ":/avatars/charlie.png", "offline"),
   455→            ]
   456→
   457→        def refresh(self) -> None:
   458→            logger.info("Refresh called from UI")
   459→            # In real case we might ask server; here we just toggle Bob
   460→            import random
   461→            statuses = ["online", "away", "dnd", "offline"]
   462→            self._colleagues[1].presence = random.choice(statuses)
   463→            self.presence_changed.emit(self._colleagues)
   464→
   465→        def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:

Avatar\n            avatar_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.PADDING, self.PADDING,\n                                               -(option.rect.width() - self.AVATAR_SIZE - self.PADDING),\n                                               -self.PADDING)\n            if avatar_path:\n                avatar_pix = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(self.AVATAR_SIZE, self.AVATAR_SIZE,\n                                                         Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)\n                painter.drawPixmap(avatar_rect.topLeft(), avatar_pix)\n\n            # Presence indicator bottom-right of avatar\n            presence_icon = self._get_presence_icon(presence)\n            indicator_sz = 10\n            indicator_rect = avatar_rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,\n                                                  self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,\n                                                  0, 0)\n            presence_pix = presence_icon.pixmap(indicator_sz, indicator_sz)\n            painter.drawPixmap(indicator_rect.topLeft(), presence_pix)\n\n            # User name\n            text_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING,\n                                             0, -self.PADDING, 0)\n            painter.setPen(option.palette.text().color())\n            text_option = QTextOption()\n            text_option.setAlignment(Qt.AlignVCenter | Qt.AlignLeft)\n            painter.drawText(text_rect, name or \"\", text_option)\n\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            logger.exception(\"Failed to paint presence delegate.\")\n        finally:\n            painter.restore()\n\n    def sizeHint(self, option: QStyleOptionViewItem, index: QModelIndex):  # noqa: N802\n        base = super().sizeHint(option, index)\n        return base.expandedTo(QSize(0, self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING))\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# PresenceWidget                                                              #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nclass PresenceWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    QWidget exposing team presence.\n\n    Responsibilities\n    ----------------\n    1. Build UI (list-view, refresh button)\n    2. Bind ViewModel (subscribe to signals / event-bus)\n    3. Bridge drag-and-drop to external micro-front-ends\n    4. Optionally integrate with UserService for unified user data\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Emitted when the user drags a colleague over somewhere else\n    colleagueDragStarted = Signal(str)  # uid\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        view_model: \"PresenceViewModel\",\n        user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None,\n        parent: QWidget | None = None\n    ) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self._vm = view_model\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n        self._build_ui()\n        self._bind_view_model()\n        self._connect_theme_changes()\n\n        # Enable drag source\n        self._list_view.setDragEnabled(True)\n        self._list_view.viewport().setAcceptDrops(False)\n        self._list_view.setDefaultDropAction(Qt.IgnoreAction)\n\n        logger.debug(\"PresenceWidget initialised.\")\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # UI                                                                  #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _build_ui(self) -> None:\n        self._list_view = QListView(self, objectName=\"presenceListView\")\n        self._list_view.setSpacing(4)\n        self._list_view.setUniformItemSizes(True)\n        self._list_view.setSelectionMode(QListView.NoSelection)\n        self._list_view.setItemDelegate(PresenceItemDelegate(self._list_view))\n\n        self._refresh_btn = QPushButton(self.tr(\"Refresh\"))\n        self._refresh_btn.setToolTip(self.tr(\"Force a manual presence refresh\"))\n\n        # Top bar\n        top_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        top_layout.addWidget(QLabel(self.tr(\"Presence\")))\n        top_layout.addItem(QSpacerItem(0, 0, QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Minimum))\n        top_layout.addWidget(self._refresh_btn)\n\n        # Main layout\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        layout.addLayout(top_layout)\n        layout.addWidget(self._list_view)\n        self.setLayout(layout)\n\n        # Model\n        self._model = _PresenceListModel([])\n        self._list_view.setModel(self._model)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Data Binding                                                       #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _bind_view_model(self) -> None:\n        self._refresh_btn.clicked.connect(self._vm.refresh)\n        self._vm.presence_changed.connect(self._on_presence_changed)\n\n        # For initial data - try UserService first, fall back to snapshot\n        if self._user_service:\n            self._refresh_from_user_service()\n        else:\n            self._on_presence_changed(self._vm.snapshot())\n\n    def _refresh_from_user_service(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Refresh colleague list from UserService.\"\"\"\n        if not self._user_service:\n            return\n\n        colleagues = []\n        for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n            colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))\n        self._model.update_content(colleagues)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Theme                                                              #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _connect_theme_changes(self) -> None:\n        if hasattr(ThemeManager, \"theme_changed\"):\n            ThemeManager.theme_changed.connect(self._on_theme_changed)\n\n    @Slot(dict)\n    def _on_theme_changed(self, theme_meta: dict) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Triggered when the global theme changed.\n\n        For the sake of demo we only update the list spacing/palette; more\n        thorough implementation would adapt colors in the delegate, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        palette = self.palette()\n        palette.setColor(self.backgroundRole(), QColor(theme_meta.get(\"window\", \"#FFFFFF\")))\n        self.setPalette(palette)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # ViewModel slot                                                     #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    @Slot(list)\n    def _on_presence_changed(self, colleagues: List[Colleague]) -> None:\n        logger.debug(\"PresenceWidget received %d colleagues.\", len(colleagues))\n        self._model.update_content(colleagues)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Drag-and-drop                                                      #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def startDrag(self, supportedActions: Qt.DropActions) -> None:  # noqa: N802\n        \"\"\"Override QListView drag start behaviour.\"\"\"\n        index = self._list_view.currentIndex()\n        if not index.isValid():\n            return\n\n        uid = index.data(_PresenceListModel.UID_ROLE)\n        display_name = index.data(_PresenceListModel.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE)\n        avatar_path = index.data(_PresenceListModel.AVATAR_ROLE)\n\n        logger.debug(\"Start drag for user %s\", display_name)\n        drag = QDrag(self)\n        mime_data = self._vm.build_mime_data(uid)\n        drag.setMimeData(mime_data)\n\n        # Pixmap for drag feedback\n        if avatar_path:\n            pixmap = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(48, 48, Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)\n            drag.setPixmap(pixmap)\n            drag.setHotSpot(QPoint(pixmap.width() // 2, pixmap.height() // 2))\n\n        drag.exec_(Qt.MoveAction)\n        self.colleagueDragStarted.emit(uid)\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# ViewModel interface placeholder                                             #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nclass PresenceViewModel(QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    This interface is implemented elsewhere in the presence module.\n\n    PresenceWidget only relies on the signals described below.\n\n    Updated to optionally use UserService.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    presence_changed = Signal(list)  # List[Colleague]\n\n    def __init__(self, user_service: Optional[\"UserService\"] = None) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self._user_service = user_service\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Trigger a refresh from UserService\n            colleagues = []\n            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n                colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))\n            self.presence_changed.emit(colleagues)\n\n    def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:\n        \"\"\"Return current presence list synchronously.\"\"\"\n        if self._user_service:\n            colleagues = []\n            for user_view in self._user_service.get_all_users():\n                colleagues.append(Colleague.from_user_view(user_view))\n            return colleagues\n        return []\n\n    def build_mime_data(self, uid: str) -> \"QMimeData\": ...  # In real case we might ask server; here we just toggle Bob\n            import random\n            statuses = [\"online\", \"away\", \"dnd\", \"offline\"]\n            self._colleagues[1].presence = random.choice(statuses)\n            self.presence_changed.emit(self._colleagues)\n\n        def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:\n            return self._colleagues\n\n        def build_mime_data(self, uid: str):\n            from PySide6.QtCore import QMimeData\n            md = QMimeData()\n            md.setText(uid)\n            return md\n\n    app = QApplication(sys.argv)\n    w = PresenceWidget(_DummyVM())\n    w.resize(240, 320)\n    w.show()\n    sys.exit(app.exec())\n", "structuredPatch": [{"oldStart": 4, "oldLines": 7, "newStart": 4, "newLines": 7, "lines": [" Qt / PySide6 visual component that renders presence information for teammates", " inside the FlockDesk desktop suite.", " ", "-This widget plays the V (View) part in the MVVM triad. It is intentionally\n*thin*: all business-logic lives in the ViewModel and/or EventBus handlers,\nallowing us to hot-swap or unit-test the UI without touching domain code.\n\nThe widget is:\n\n    • Subscribing to the global EventBus for presence/theme updates.\n    • Displaying colleagues in a QListView with custom item-delegates so we\n      can paint avatars, names and activity indicators.\n    • Drag-and-drop aware – users can drag a colleague into another micro-UI\n      (e.g. chat or whiteboard) to open a contextual collaboration pane.\n    • Lightweight – starts instantly and survives theme changes without leaks.\n\nAuthor:  The FlockDesk team\n\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport logging\nimport sys\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import List, Optional\n\nfrom PySide6.QtCore import (QAbstractListModel, QByteArray, QModelIndex,\n                            QObject, QPoint, Qt, Signal, Slot)\nfrom PySide6.QtGui import (QColor, QDrag, QIcon, QPainter, QPixmap,\n                           QStandardItemModel, QTextOption)\nfrom PySide6.QtWidgets import (QApplication, QHBoxLayout, QLabel, QListView,\n                               QPushButton, QSpacerItem, QStyle, QStyleOptionViewItem,\n                               QStyledItemDelegate, QVBoxLayout, QWidget)\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Optional project-local imports                                              #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\ntry:\n    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus, Topic  # type: ignore\n    from flockdesk.modules.presence.model import PresenceState  # type: ignore\n    from flockdesk.shared.theming import ThemeManager  # type: ignore\nexcept (ModuleNotFoundError, ImportError):\n    # Fallback stubs to keep linters and RT preview alive\n    class EventBus:  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Very small stub when running in isolation.\"\"\"\n        @staticmethod\n        def subscribe(topic: str, listener: QObject, slot: str) -> None: ...\n        @staticmethod\n        def publish(topic: str, payload) -> None: ...\n\n    class PresenceState:  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Enum stub for online/offline/etc.\"\"\"\n        ONLINE = \"online\"\n        AWAY = \"away\"\n        OFFLINE = \"offline\"\n\n    class ThemeManager:  # noqa: D401\n        \"\"\"Simplistic theme stub.\"\"\"\n        theme_changed = Signal(dict)\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Dataclasses & Models                                                        #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass Colleague:\n    \"\"\"Lightweight data container for a colleague row.\"\"\"\n    uid: str\n    display_name: str\n    avatar_path: str\n    presence: PresenceState\n\n\nclass _PresenceListModel(QAbstractListModel):\n    \"\"\"\n    A trivial QAbstractListModel that exposes colleagues to the QListView.\n\n    This model is intentionally 100 % dumb: all mutations come from the\n    PresenceViewModel which will feed new lists in one go.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Roles used by the delegate for painting\n    UID_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 1\n    DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 2\n    AVATAR_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 3\n    PRESENCE_ROLE = Qt.UserRole + 4\n\n    _ROLE_NAMES = {\n        UID_ROLE: QByteArray(b\"uid\"),\n        DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE: QByteArray(b\"display_name\"),\n        AVATAR_ROLE: QByteArray(b\"avatar\"),\n        PRESENCE_ROLE: QByteArray(b\"presence\"),\n    }\n\n    def __init__(self, colleagues: Optional[List[Colleague]] = None, parent: QObject | None = None) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self._colleagues: List[Colleague] = colleagues or []\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Required overrides                                                    #\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def rowCount(self, parent: QModelIndex = QModelIndex()) -> int:  # noqa: N802\n        return 0 if parent.isValid() else len(self._colleagues)\n\n    def data(self, index: QModelIndex, role: int = Qt.DisplayRole):  # noqa: N802\n        if not index.isValid():\n            return None\n\n        try:\n            colleague = self._colleagues[index.row()]\n        except IndexError:\n            return None\n\n        if role == Qt.DisplayRole:\n            return colleague.display_name\n        if role == self.UID_ROLE:\n            return colleague.uid\n        if role == self.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE:\n            return colleague.display_name\n        if role == self.AVATAR_ROLE:\n            return colleague.avatar_path\n        if role == self.PRESENCE_ROLE:\n            return colleague.presence\n        return None\n\n    def roleNames(self) -> dict[int, QByteArray]:  # noqa: N802\n        return self._ROLE_NAMES\n\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n    # Public API                                                            #\n    # --------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\n    def update_content(self, colleagues: List[Colleague]) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Replace the entire model dataset in one shot.\"\"\"\n        self.beginResetModel()\n        self._colleagues = colleagues\n        self.endResetModel()\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Custom Delegate                                                             #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nclass PresenceItemDelegate(QStyledItemDelegate):\n    \"\"\"Paints each list item with avatar, name and presence indicator icon.\"\"\"\n\n    AVATAR_SIZE = 32\n    PADDING = 6\n\n    _PRESENCE_ICONS = {\n        PresenceState.ONLINE: QIcon(\":/presence/online.svg\"),\n        PresenceState.AWAY: QIcon(\":/presence/away.svg\"),\n        PresenceState.OFFLINE: QIcon(\":/presence/offline.svg\"),\n    }\n\n    def paint(self, painter: QPainter, option: QStyleOptionViewItem, index: QModelIndex) -> None:\n        painter.save()\n        try:\n            # Draw selection highlight\n            if option.state & QStyle.State_Selected:\n                painter.fillRect(option.rect, option.palette.highlight())\n\n            # Fetch data\n            name: str = index.data(_PresenceListModel.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE)\n            avatar_path: str = index.data(_PresenceListModel.AVATAR_ROLE)\n            presence: PresenceState = index.data(_PresenceListModel.PRESENCE_ROLE)\n\n            # Avatar\n            avatar_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.PADDING, self.PADDING,\n                                               -(option.rect.width() - self.AVATAR_SIZE - self.PADDING),\n                                               -self.PADDING)\n            avatar_pix = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(self.AVATAR_SIZE, self.AVATAR_SIZE,\n                                                     Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)\n            painter.drawPixmap(avatar_rect.topLeft(), avatar_pix)\n\n            # Presence indicator bottom-right of avatar\n            presence_icon: QIcon = self._PRESENCE_ICONS.get(presence, QIcon())\n            indicator_sz = 10\n            indicator_rect = avatar_rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,\n                                                  self.AVATAR_SIZE - indicator_sz,\n                                                  0, 0)\n            presence_pix = presence_icon.pixmap(indicator_sz, indicator_sz)\n            painter.drawPixmap(indicator_rect.topLeft(), presence_pix)\n\n            # User name\n            text_rect = option.rect.adjusted(self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING,\n                                             0, -self.PADDING, 0)\n            painter.setPen(option.palette.text().color())\n            text_option = QTextOption()\n            text_option.setAlignment(Qt.AlignVCenter | Qt.AlignLeft)\n            painter.drawText(text_rect, name, text_option)\n\n        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover\n            logger.exception(\"Failed to paint presence delegate.\")\n        finally:\n            painter.restore()\n\n    def sizeHint(self, option: QStyleOptionViewItem, index: QModelIndex):  # noqa: N802\n        base = super().sizeHint(option, index)\n        return base.expandedTo(QSize(0, self.AVATAR_SIZE + 2 * self.PADDING))\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# PresenceWidget                                                              #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nclass PresenceWidget(QWidget):\n    \"\"\"\n    QWidget exposing team presence.\n\n    Responsibilities\n    ----------------\n    1. Build UI (list-view, refresh button)\n    2. Bind ViewModel (subscribe to signals / event-bus)\n    3. Bridge drag-and-drop to external micro-front-ends\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Emitted when the user drags a colleague over somewhere else\n    colleagueDragStarted = Signal(str)  # uid\n\n    def __init__(self, view_model: \"PresenceViewModel\", parent: QWidget | None = None) -> None:\n        super().__init__(parent)\n        self._vm = view_model\n\n        self._build_ui()\n        self._bind_view_model()\n        self._connect_theme_changes()\n\n        # Enable drag source\n        self._list_view.setDragEnabled(True)\n        self._list_view.viewport().setAcceptDrops(False)\n        self._list_view.setDefaultDropAction(Qt.IgnoreAction)\n\n        logger.debug(\"PresenceWidget initialised.\")\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # UI                                                                  #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _build_ui(self) -> None:\n        self._list_view = QListView(self, objectName=\"presenceListView\")\n        self._list_view.setSpacing(4)\n        self._list_view.setUniformItemSizes(True)\n        self._list_view.setSelectionMode(QListView.NoSelection)\n        self._list_view.setItemDelegate(PresenceItemDelegate(self._list_view))\n\n        self._refresh_btn = QPushButton(self.tr(\"Refresh\"))\n        self._refresh_btn.setToolTip(self.tr(\"Force a manual presence refresh\"))\n\n        # Top bar\n        top_layout = QHBoxLayout()\n        top_layout.addWidget(QLabel(self.tr(\"Presence\")))\n        top_layout.addItem(QSpacerItem(0, 0, QSizePolicy.Expanding, QSizePolicy.Minimum))\n        top_layout.addWidget(self._refresh_btn)\n\n        # Main layout\n        layout = QVBoxLayout(self)\n        layout.addLayout(top_layout)\n        layout.addWidget(self._list_view)\n        self.setLayout(layout)\n\n        # Model\n        self._model = _PresenceListModel([])\n        self._list_view.setModel(self._model)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Data Binding                                                       #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _bind_view_model(self) -> None:\n        self._refresh_btn.clicked.connect(self._vm.refresh)\n        self._vm.presence_changed.connect(self._on_presence_changed)\n\n        # For initial data\n        self._on_presence_changed(self._vm.snapshot())\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Theme                                                              #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def _connect_theme_changes(self) -> None:\n        if hasattr(ThemeManager, \"theme_changed\"):\n            ThemeManager.theme_changed.connect(self._on_theme_changed)\n\n    @Slot(dict)\n    def _on_theme_changed(self, theme_meta: dict) -> None:\n        \"\"\"\n        Triggered when the global theme changed.\n\n        For the sake of demo we only update the list spacing/palette; more\n        thorough implementation would adapt colors in the delegate, etc.\n        \"\"\"\n        palette = self.palette()\n        palette.setColor(self.backgroundRole(), QColor(theme_meta.get(\"window\", \"#FFFFFF\")))\n        self.setPalette(palette)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # ViewModel slot                                                     #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    @Slot(list)\n    def _on_presence_changed(self, colleagues: List[Colleague]) -> None:\n        logger.debug(\"PresenceWidget received %d colleagues.\", len(colleagues))\n        self._model.update_content(colleagues)\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # Drag-and-drop                                                      #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def startDrag(self, supportedActions: Qt.DropActions) -> None:  # noqa: N802\n        \"\"\"Override QListView drag start behaviour.\"\"\"\n        index = self._list_view.currentIndex()\n        if not index.isValid():\n            return\n\n        uid = index.data(_PresenceListModel.UID_ROLE)\n        display_name = index.data(_PresenceListModel.DISPLAY_NAME_ROLE)\n        avatar_path = index.data(_PresenceListModel.AVATAR_ROLE)\n\n        logger.debug(\"Start drag for user %s\", display_name)\n        drag = QDrag(self)\n        mime_data = self._vm.build_mime_data(uid)\n        drag.setMimeData(mime_data)\n\n        # Pixmap for drag feedback\n        pixmap = QPixmap(avatar_path).scaled(48, 48, Qt.KeepAspectRatio, Qt.SmoothTransformation)\n        drag.setPixmap(pixmap)\n        drag.setHotSpot(QPoint(pixmap.width() // 2, pixmap.height() // 2))\n\n        drag.exec_(Qt.MoveAction)\n        self.colleagueDragStarted.emit(uid)\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# ViewModel interface placeholder                                             #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nclass PresenceViewModel(QObject):\n    \"\"\"\n    This interface is implemented elsewhere in the presence module.\n\n    PresenceWidget only relies on the signals described below.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    presence_changed = Signal(list)  # List[Colleague]\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n    # API expected by the widget                                         #\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #\n\n    def refresh(self) -> None: ...  # noqa: D400\n\n    def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:\n        \"\"\"Return current presence list synchronously.\"\"\"\n        return []\n\n    def build_mime_data(self, uid: str) -> \"QMimeData\": ...  # noqa: D401\n\n\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n# Debug entry-point (can be stripped for prod)                                #\n# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- #\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":  # pragma: no cover\n    # Minimal harness to showcase the widget in isolation.\n    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG)\n\n    class _DummyVM(PresenceViewModel):\n\n        def __init__(self) -> None:\n            super().__init__()\n            self._colleagues = [\n                Colleague(\"1\", \"Alice\", \":/avatars/alice.png\", PresenceState.ONLINE),\n                Colleague(\"2\", \"Bob\", \":/avatars/bob.png\", PresenceState.AWAY),\n                Colleague(\"3\", \"Charlie\", \":/avatars/charlie.png\", PresenceState.OFFLINE),\n            ]\n\n        def refresh(self) -> None:\n            logger.info(\"Refresh called from UI\")\n            # In real case we might ask server; here we just toggle Bob\n            import random\n            self._colleagues[1].presence = random.choice(\n                [PresenceState.ONLINE, PresenceState.AWAY, PresenceState.OFFLINE])\n            self.presence_changed.emit(self._colleagues)\n\n        def snapshot(self) -> List[Colleague]:\n            return self._colleagues\n\n        def build_mime_data(self, uid: str):\n            from PySide6.QtCore import QMimeData\n            md = QMimeData()\n            md.setText(uid)\n            return md\n\n    app = QApplication(sys.argv)\n    w = PresenceWidget(_DummyVM())\n    w.resize(240, 320)\n    w.show()\n    sys.exit(app.exec())"}

1→"""
     2→flockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget
     3→--------------------------------------
     4→
     5→Reusable widget that displays (and manages) a user’s avatar picture with
     6→real-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an
     7→extensible context-menu.
     8→
     9→The widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:
    10→in chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.
    11→
    12→Typical usage
    13→~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    14→avatar = AvatarWidget(
    15→    user_id="42",
    16→    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional
    17→    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional
    18→)
    19→"""
    20→
    21→from __future__ import annotations
    22→
    23→import logging
    24→import os
    25→import sys
    26→from collections import OrderedDict
    27→from pathlib import Path
    28→from typing import Optional
    29→
    30→from PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,
    31→                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)
    32→from PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,
    33→                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,
    34→                           QPixmap)
    35→from PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)
    36→
    37→__all__ = ["AvatarWidget"]
    38→
    39→log = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    40→
    41→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42→# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services
    43→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44→
    45→
    46→class _DummyBus:
    47→    """Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported)."""
    48→
    49→    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):
    50→        pass
    51→
    52→    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):
    53→        pass
    54→
    55→
    56→class _DummyTheme:
    57→    """Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes)."""
    58→
    59→    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = "#CCCCCC") -> str:
    60→        return fallback
    61→
    62→
    63→try:
    64→    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus
    65→except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    66→    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore
    67→
    68→
    69→try:
    70→    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager
    71→except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    72→    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore
    73→
    74→
    75→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    76→# Pixmap caching helpers
    77→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
    78→
    79→
    80→class _PixmapCache:
    81→    """
    82→    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.
    83→    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple
    84→    locations at once.
    85→    """
    86→
    87→    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32
    88→    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()
    89→
    90→    @classmethod
    91→    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:
    92→        try:
    93→            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)
    94→            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)
    95→            return pixmap
    96→        except KeyError:
    97→            return None
    98→
    99→    @classmethod
   100→    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:
   101→        cls._store[path] = pixmap
   102→        cls._store.move_to_end(path)
   103→        # evict least recently used
   104→        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:
   105→            cls._store.popitem(last=False)
   106→
   107→
   108→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   109→# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread
   110→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   111→
   112→
   113→class _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):
   114→    """
   115→    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very
   116→    large images are supplied.
   117→    """
   118→
   119→    def __init__(
   120→        self,
   121→        path: str,
   122→        target_size: QSize,
   123→        on_loaded: "Signal[QPixmap]",
   124→    ) -> None:
   125→        super().__init__()
   126→        self._path = path
   127→        self._target_size = target_size
   128→        self._on_loaded = on_loaded
   129→
   130→    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401
   131→        try:
   132→            image = QImage(self._path)
   133→            if image.isNull():
   134→                raise ValueError(f"Unable to load image: {self._path}")
   135→
   136→            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale
   137→            side = min(image.width(), image.height())
   138→            cropped = image.copy(
   139→                (image.width() - side) // 2,
   140→                (image.height() - side) // 2,
   141→                side,
   142→                side,
   143→            )
   144→            scaled = cropped.scaled(
   145→                self._target_size,
   146→                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,
   147→                Qt.SmoothTransformation,
   148→            )
   149→            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)
   150→            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)
   151→            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)
   152→        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
   153→            log.exception("Failed to load avatar: %s", self._path)
   154→
   155→
   156→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   157→# Avatar widget
   158→# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   159→
   160→
   161→class AvatarWidget(QWidget):
   162→    """
   163→    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.
   164→
   165→    Signals
   166→    -------
   167→    clicked: Signal[None]
   168→        Emitted on left mouse click.
   169→    avatarChanged: Signal[str]
   170→        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.
   171→    """
   172→
   173→    clicked = Signal()
   174→    avatarChanged = Signal(str)
   175→
   176→    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {
   177→        "image/png",
   178→        "image/jpeg",
   179→        "image/webp",
   180→        "image/gif",
   181→    }
   182→    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64
   183→
   184→    def __init__(
   185→        self,
   186→        user_id: str,
   187→        *,
   188→        size: int | None = None,
   189→        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,
   190→        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,
   191→        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
   192→    ) -> None:
   193→        super().__init__(parent)
   194→
   195→        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
   196→        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)
   197→        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))
   198→
   199→        # dependencies
   200→        self._user_id = user_id
   201→        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()
   202→        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()
   203→
   204→        # runtime state
   205→        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None
   206→        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None
   207→        self._presence: str = "offline"  # offline, online, busy, away …
   208→        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()
   209→
   210→        self._install_event_listeners()
   211→
   212→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   213→    # Public API
   214→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   215→
   216→    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:
   217→        """Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None)."""
   218→        return self._avatar_path
   219→
   220→    def presence(self) -> str:
   221→        """Return the current presence key (online / busy / …)."""
   222→        return self._presence
   223→
   224→    @Slot(str)
   225→    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:
   226→        """Update the avatar from the given image path."""
   227→        path = os.path.abspath(path)
   228→        if not os.path.exists(path):
   229→            log.warning("Avatar path does not exist: %s", path)
   230→            return
   231→
   232→        self._avatar_path = path
   233→        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)
   234→        if cached is not None:
   235→            self._pixmap = cached
   236→            self.update()
   237→        else:
   238→            loader = _AvatarLoader(
   239→                path=path,
   240→                target_size=self.size(),
   241→                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,
   242→            )
   243→            self._thread_pool.start(loader)
   244→
   245→    @Slot(str)
   246→    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:
   247→        """Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus."""
   248→        if state == self._presence:
   249→            return
   250→        self._presence = state
   251→        self.update()
   252→
   253→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   254→    # Event handling
   255→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   256→
   257→    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401
   258→        """Paint circular avatar with presence badge."""
   259→        painter = QPainter(self)
   260→        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)
   261→
   262→        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():
   263→            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)
   264→            path = self._rounded_rect_path()
   265→            painter.setClipPath(path)
   266→            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)
   267→        else:
   268→            # fallback placeholder
   269→            painter.setBrush(
   270→                self._theme.color("avatar.background", "#8F8F8F")
   271→            )
   272→            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)
   273→            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())
   274→
   275→        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)
   276→
   277→    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401
   278→        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
   279→            self.clicked.emit()
   280→        super().mousePressEvent(event)
   281→
   282→    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401
   283→        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):
   284→            event.acceptProposedAction()
   285→
   286→    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401
   287→        url: QUrl
   288→        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
   289→            if url.isLocalFile():
   290→                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))
   291→                event.acceptProposedAction()
   292→                return
   293→        QMessageBox.warning(self, "Invalid file", "Please drop a local image file.")
   294→
   295→    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401
   296→        menu = QMenu(self)
   297→
   298→        choose_action = QAction("Change avatar …", self)
   299→        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)
   300→        menu.addAction(choose_action)
   301→
   302→        menu.addSeparator()
   303→
   304→        if self._avatar_path:
   305→            reveal = QAction("Reveal in Explorer", self)
   306→            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)
   307→            menu.addAction(reveal)
   308→
   309→        menu.exec(event.globalPos())
   310→
   311→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   312→    # Internal helpers
   313→    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
   314→
   315→    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:
   316→        """
   317→        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates
   318→        for our user, etc.
   319→        """
   320→        # presence update
   321→        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):
   322→            self._event_bus.subscribe(
   323→                "presence.changed",
   324→                handler=lambda e: (
   325→                    self.set_presence(e.payload["state"])
   326→                    if e.payload.get("user_id") == self._user_id
   327→                    else None
   328→                ),
   329→            )
   330→
   331→        # theme hot reload
   332→        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):

"""
flockdesk.shared.widgets.avatar_widget
--------------------------------------

Reusable widget that displays (and manages) a user's avatar picture with
real-time presence indication, theme awareness, drag-and-drop support and an
extensible context-menu.

The widget is intended to be used throughout the FlockDesk desktop client:
in chat lists, white-board collaborators, community dashboards, etc.

Updated to optionally use the unified UserService for user data and presence.

Typical usage
~~~~~~~~~~~~~
avatar = AvatarWidget(
    user_id="42",
    event_bus=inject.instance(EventBus),          # optional
    theme_manager=inject.instance(ThemeManager),  # optional
    user_service=inject.instance(UserService),    # optional - unified user data
)
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import logging
import os
import sys
from collections import OrderedDict
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Optional, TYPE_CHECKING

from PySide6.QtCore import (QEvent, QPoint, QRunnable, QSize, Qt, QThreadPool,
                            QUrl, Signal, Slot)
from PySide6.QtGui import (QAction, QContextMenuEvent, QDragEnterEvent,
                           QDropEvent, QIcon, QImage, QMouseEvent, QPainter,
                           QPixmap)
from PySide6.QtWidgets import (QFileDialog, QMenu, QMessageBox, QWidget)

__all__ = ["AvatarWidget"]

log = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# (Optional) third-party FlockDesk services
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


class _DummyBus:
    """Stand-in for the real application-wide EventBus (if not imported)."""

    def subscribe(self, *_a, **_kw):
        pass

    def publish(self, *_a, **_kw):
        pass


class _DummyTheme:
    """Stand-in for the real ThemeManager (hot-swappable themes)."""

    def color(self, key: str, fallback: str = "#CCCCCC") -> str:
        return fallback


try:
    from flockdesk.core.event_bus import EventBus
except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    EventBus = _DummyBus  # type: ignore


try:
    from flockdesk.core.theme import ThemeManager
except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
    ThemeManager = _DummyTheme  # type: ignore


# Import the unified UserService
try:
    from flockdesk.core.services.user_service import UserService
except ImportError:
    UserService = None  # type: ignore


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pixmap caching helpers
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


class _PixmapCache:
    """
    Very small LRU cache that stores pixmaps keyed by absolute path.
    Prevents re-decoding identical images when the avatar is shown in multiple
    locations at once.
    """

    _MAX_ENTRIES = 32
    _store: OrderedDict[str, QPixmap] = OrderedDict()

    @classmethod
    def get(cls, path: str) -> Optional[QPixmap]:
        try:
            pixmap = cls._store.pop(path)
            cls._store[path] = pixmap  # move to end (most recently used)
            return pixmap
        except KeyError:
            return None

    @classmethod
    def put(cls, path: str, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:
        cls._store[path] = pixmap
        cls._store.move_to_end(path)
        # evict least recently used
        while len(cls._store) > cls._MAX_ENTRIES:
            cls._store.popitem(last=False)


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Asynchronous loader used to decode / scale the avatar off the UI thread
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


class _AvatarLoader(QRunnable):
    """
    Decode and scale a QPixmap in a thread-pool to avoid UI jank when very
    large images are supplied.
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        path: str,
        target_size: QSize,
        on_loaded: "Signal[QPixmap]",
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        self._path = path
        self._target_size = target_size
        self._on_loaded = on_loaded

    def run(self) -> None:  # noqa: D401
        try:
            image = QImage(self._path)
            if image.isNull():
                raise ValueError(f"Unable to load image: {self._path}")

            # Preserve aspect ratio, crop to square, then scale
            side = min(image.width(), image.height())
            cropped = image.copy(
                (image.width() - side) // 2,
                (image.height() - side) // 2,
                side,
                side,
            )
            scaled = cropped.scaled(
                self._target_size,
                Qt.KeepAspectRatio,
                Qt.SmoothTransformation,
            )
            pixmap = QPixmap.fromImage(scaled)
            _PixmapCache.put(self._path, pixmap)
            self._on_loaded.emit(pixmap)
        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
            log.exception("Failed to load avatar: %s", self._path)


# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Avatar widget
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------


class AvatarWidget(QWidget):
    """
    Displays a round avatar with an optional presence badge.

    Updated to optionally integrate with the unified UserService for
    getting user profile data (avatar, presence).

    Signals
    -------
    clicked: Signal[None]
        Emitted on left mouse click.
    avatarChanged: Signal[str]
        Emitted when the user changes his / her avatar locally.
    """

    clicked = Signal()
    avatarChanged = Signal(str)

    _DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST = {
        "image/png",
        "image/jpeg",
        "image/webp",
        "image/gif",
    }
    _DEFAULT_SIZE = 64

    def __init__(
        self,
        user_id: str,
        *,
        size: int | None = None,
        event_bus: Optional[EventBus] = None,
        theme_manager: Optional[ThemeManager] = None,
        user_service: Optional["UserService"] = None,
        parent: Optional[QWidget] = None,
    ) -> None:
        super().__init__(parent)

        self.setAcceptDrops(True)
        self.setCursor(Qt.PointingHandCursor)
        self.setFixedSize(QSize(size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE, size or self._DEFAULT_SIZE))

        # dependencies
        self._user_id = user_id
        self._event_bus = event_bus or _DummyBus()
        self._theme = theme_manager or _DummyTheme()
        self._user_service = user_service

        # runtime state
        self._avatar_path: Optional[str] = None
        self._pixmap: Optional[QPixmap] = None
        self._presence: str = "offline"  # offline, online, busy, away, dnd …
        self._thread_pool = QThreadPool.globalInstance()

        self._install_event_listeners()

        # If we have a UserService, load initial data from it
        if self._user_service:
            self._load_from_user_service()

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Public API
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    def avatar(self) -> Optional[str]:
        """Return absolute path of current avatar (may be None)."""
        return self._avatar_path

    def presence(self) -> str:
        """Return the current presence key (online / busy / …)."""
        return self._presence

    def user_id(self) -> str:
        """Return the user ID for this avatar."""
        return self._user_id

    @Slot(str)
    def set_avatar(self, path: str) -> None:
        """Update the avatar from the given image path."""
        path = os.path.abspath(path)
        if not os.path.exists(path):
            log.warning("Avatar path does not exist: %s", path)
            return

        self._avatar_path = path
        cached = _PixmapCache.get(path)
        if cached is not None:
            self._pixmap = cached
            self.update()
        else:
            loader = _AvatarLoader(
                path=path,
                target_size=self.size(),
                on_loaded=self._on_async_loaded,
            )
            self._thread_pool.start(loader)

    @Slot(str)
    def set_presence(self, state: str) -> None:
        """Update presence overlay, e.g. from the event-bus or UserService."""
        if state == self._presence:
            return
        self._presence = state
        self.update()

    def refresh_from_user_service(self) -> None:
        """Refresh avatar and presence from the UserService."""
        if self._user_service:
            self._load_from_user_service()

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    # UserService integration
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    def _load_from_user_service(self) -> None:
        """Load avatar and presence data from the UserService."""
        if not self._user_service:
            return

        user_view = self._user_service.get_user_view(self._user_id)
        if user_view:
            # Set presence from UserService
            status = user_view.get("status", "offline")
            self.set_presence(status)

            # Set avatar if available
            avatar_path = user_view.get("avatar_path")
            if avatar_path:
                self.set_avatar(avatar_path)

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Event handling
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    def paintEvent(self, event):  # noqa: D401
        """Paint circular avatar with presence badge."""
        painter = QPainter(self)
        painter.setRenderHint(QPainter.Antialiasing)

        if self._pixmap and not self._pixmap.isNull():
            painter.setBrush(Qt.NoBrush)
            path = self._rounded_rect_path()
            painter.setClipPath(path)
            painter.drawPixmap(self.rect(), self._pixmap)
        else:
            # fallback placeholder
            painter.setBrush(
                self._theme.color("avatar.background", "#8F8F8F")
            )
            painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)
            painter.drawEllipse(self.rect())

        self._draw_presence_indicator(painter)

    def mousePressEvent(self, event: QMouseEvent):  # noqa: D401
        if event.button() == Qt.LeftButton:
            self.clicked.emit()
        super().mousePressEvent(event)

    def dragEnterEvent(self, event: QDragEnterEvent):  # noqa: D401
        if any(fmt in event.mimeData().formats() for fmt in self._DRAG_MIME_WHITELIST):
            event.acceptProposedAction()

    def dropEvent(self, event: QDropEvent):  # noqa: D401
        url: QUrl
        for url in event.mimeData().urls():
            if url.isLocalFile():
                self._handle_new_avatar(Path(url.toLocalFile()))
                event.acceptProposedAction()
                return
        QMessageBox.warning(self, "Invalid file", "Please drop a local image file.")

    def contextMenuEvent(self, event: QContextMenuEvent):  # noqa: D401
        menu = QMenu(self)

        choose_action = QAction("Change avatar …", self)
        choose_action.triggered.connect(self._choose_avatar)
        menu.addAction(choose_action)

        menu.addSeparator()

        if self._avatar_path:
            reveal = QAction("Reveal in Explorer", self)
            reveal.triggered.connect(self._reveal_in_file_manager)
            menu.addAction(reveal)

        menu.exec(event.globalPos())

    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------
    # Internal helpers
    # ---------------------------------------------------------------------

    def _install_event_listeners(self) -> None:
        """
        Subscribe to application-wide events: theme change, presence updates
        for our user, etc.
        """
        # presence update - subscribe to both old and new event formats
        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):
            # Old format: presence.changed
            self._event_bus.subscribe(
                "presence.changed",
                handler=lambda e: (
                    self.set_presence(e.payload["state"])
                    if e.payload.get("user_id") == self._user_id
                    else None
                ),
            )
            # New format from UserService: presence.updated
            self._event_bus.subscribe(
                "presence.updated",
                handler=lambda e: self._handle_presence_updated(e),
            )

        # theme hot reload
        if isinstance(self._theme, ThemeManager):
            self._theme.themeChanged.connect(lambda: self.update())  # type: ignore

    def _handle_presence_updated(self, event) -> None:
        """Handle presence.updated events from UserService."""
        try:
            # Handle both Event wrapper and direct dict payload
            if hasattr(event, "payload"):
                payload = event.payload
            elif isinstance(event, dict):
                payload = event
            else:
                return

            if payload.get("user_id") == self._user_id:
                # Get state from either 'state' or 'status' field
                state = payload.get("state") or payload.get("status", "offline")
                self.set_presence(state)

                # Also update avatar if present in metadata
                metadata = payload.get("metadata", {})
                avatar_path = metadata.get("avatar_path")
                if avatar_path:
                    self.set_avatar(avatar_path)
        except Exception:
            log.exception("Error handling presence.updated event")

    @Slot(QPixmap)
    def _on_async_loaded(self, pixmap: QPixmap) -> None:
        self._pixmap = pixmap
        self.update()

    def _rounded_rect_path(self):
        """Returns a QPainterPath of a circle matching widget size."""
        from PySide6.QtGui import QPainterPath

        path = QPainterPath()
        path.addEllipse(self.rect())
        return path

    def _draw_presence_indicator(self, painter: QPainter) -> None:
        """Paint a small presence dot on bottom-right corner."""
        colors = {
            "online": "#4CAF50",
            "busy": "#F44336",
            "dnd": "#F44336",  # Do-Not-Disturb uses same color as busy
            "away": "#FFB300",
            "offline": "#9E9E9E",
        }
        radius = max(6, self.width() // 6)
        center = QPoint(self.width() - radius, self.height() - radius)

        painter.setPen(Qt.NoPen)
        painter.setBrush(colors.get(self._presence.lower(), "#9E9E9E"))
        painter.drawEllipse(center, radius, radius)

    # --------------------------------------------------------------
    # Context-menu actions
    # --------------------------------------------------------------

    def _choose_avatar(self) -> None:
        """Open file-dialog for user to pick a new avatar picture."""
        filename, _ = QFileDialog.getOpenFileName(
            self,
            "Select Avatar Picture",
            "",
            "Images (*.png *.jpg *.jpeg *.webp *.gif)",
        )
        if filename:
            self._handle_new_avatar(Path(filename))

    def _handle_new_avatar(self, path: Path) -> None:
        """Validate and persist the chosen avatar (drag-drop or file-dialog)."""
        if not path.exists():
            return
        if not path.suffix.lower() in {".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".webp", ".gif"}:
            QMessageBox.warning(self, "Unsupported file", "File is not a supported image type.")
            return

        self.set_avatar(str(path))
        self.avatarChanged.emit(str(path))

        # If we have a UserService, update the profile through it
        if self._user_service and self._user_id == self._user_service.user_id:
            profile = self._user_service.profile
            profile.avatar_path = str(path)
            self._user_service.save(profile)

        # Publish to event-bus so other processes may sync the change
        if isinstance(self._event_bus, EventBus):
            self._event_bus.publish(  # type: ignore
                "avatar.changed",
                user_id=self._user_id,
                path=str(path),
            )

    def _reveal_in_file_manager(self) -> None:
        """Platform-specific file manager reveal of the avatar file."""
        if not self._avatar_path:
            return
        try:
            if sys.platform.startswith("darwin"):
                from subprocess import call

                call(["open", "--", self._avatar_path])
            elif os.name == "nt":
                os.startfile(self._avatar_path)  # type: ignore  # pylint: disable=protected-access
            else:  # linux, etc.
                from subprocess import call

                call(["xdg-open", self._avatar_path])
        except Exception:  # pragma: no cover
            log.exception("Could not open file manager for %s", self._avatar_path)
